name: Hollyland TX Furry Windshield Lark M1 & Lark C1
description: The Hollyland TX Furry Windshield is designed to fit perfectly with the Hollyland Lark M1 & C1 wireless microphone transmitters. It is made of high-quality, soft fur that effectively reduces wind noise, providing clear and crisp audio even in harsh weather conditions. The windshield is lightweight, easy to attach, and durable, making it an ideal choice for on-the-go filmmakers.

features.Key Features :: Weight for each piece: 2g | Color: Black | Applications: For outdoor wind muff and noise reduction | Recommended for outdoor use and harsh environments to effectively shield off wind noise, easy to install, and not easy to fall off.
